message:
feat(ufunc,dtype,linalg): add bitwise/arithmetic differential tests, improve dtype string cast, optimize linalg solvers and polyfit

fnp-conformance: add two new test functions —
  differential_bitwise_ops_cross_dtype_match_oracle (16 cases) and
  differential_arithmetic_edge_cases_match_oracle (21 cases) verifying
  floor_divide, remainder, power, division-by-zero, ldexp, and bitwise ops
  against the NumPy oracle.

fnp-dtype: replace generic get_f64-based string cast with per-variant
  exact-representation paths (integer types use native to_string avoiding
  float64 truncation of large integers, f16 goes through f32, complex
  formats as (re+imj), bool as True/False).

fnp-linalg: add lu_forward_back_multi for batched RHS solving (eliminates
  column-by-column extraction loop in solve_nxn_multi); restructure
  cholesky_solve_multi to row-major forward/backward substitution
  (removes per-column loop overhead).

fnp-ufunc: replace polyfit's manual Gaussian elimination of normal
  equations (X^T X)c = X^T y with lstsq_svd from fnp-linalg, improving
  numerical stability for ill-conditioned Vandermonde systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
